sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16196" key="a)sighsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσῑγ-ησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n16196.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inability to keep silence,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.502c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
